caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, grey spiked wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and light-colored suspenders, wearing large over-ear headphones. A black professional microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, another person wearing a black shirt and a cap is partially visible, along with walls decorated with framed photographs and apparel. Two logos appear on screen: one on the left featuring a microphone icon and the text "TALK RADIO PODCAST," and another on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, slightly shifting his facial expression and gaze as if speaking or listening during a recording session, while the background and equipment remain static.
